creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

Please use the diff from the review, mat went over some of the things. Much improved version :-). https://reviews.freebsd.org/D19130

As for the consent of Ben, he gave this in the following PR: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=231669


Although, I don't actually mind that the line stay as well as the maintainer.
